subject: Fwd: BBJ for Sale
body:
Sent from my iPhone

Begin forwarded message:

> From: Jim Miller <jim.miller@dpworld.com>
> Date: December 13, 2014 at 9:53:26 AM GMT+4
> To: Sultan Ahmed Bin Sulayem <ssulayem@me.com>
> Subject: BBJ for Sale
> 
> I can’t contact Celestial on the local phones. This is definitely the aircraft and being brokered through AvJet.
> 
> Everything looks ugly after seeing ours. 
> 
> At one point this BBJ was owned by Roman Abramovich.
>
body_html:
Sent from my iPhone

Begin forwarded message:

From: Jim Miller <jim.miller@dpworld.com>
Date: December 13, 2014 at 9:53:26 AM GMT+4
To: Sultan Ahmed Bin Sulayem <ssulayem@me.com>
Subject: BBJ for Sale

I can’t contact Celestial on the local phones. This is definitely the aircraft and being brokered through AvJet.

Everything looks ugly after seeing ours.

At one point this BBJ was owned by Roman Abramovich.
